summary: Comprehensive testing of QRGate app - backend (35/35 tests passed), frontend flows, and integration. Fixed critical VenueLanding.jsx API bug. Identified 3 other bugs needing main agent fixes.

minor.issue: Validation rate calculation bug: `all_scans` queries ALL scans across all venues (no venue_id filter), while `all_orders` filters by venue. Causes validation rate >100% (shows 207%). Fix: filter scans by checking if scan.order_id is in the venue's order IDs.

Onboarding wizard sends `stripe_onboarded: true` to this endpoint, but `stripe_onboarded` is NOT in VenueSettingsUpdate model, so it's silently ignored. New venues via onboarding never get stripe_onboarded=True saved in DB, causing checkout to fail. Fix: add `stripe_onboarded: Optional[bool] = None` to VenueSettingsUpdate model.

ui_bugs.issue: DashboardOrders component (orders with refund buttons) is imported in Dashboard.jsx but never added to any Route. The orders management page is completely unreachable. Add `<Route path='/orders' element={<DashboardOrders />} />` and a sidebar menu item for orders in Dashboard.jsx

Demo venue seeded with stripe_onboarded=True but stripe_account_id=None. Stripe status API returns 'not_connected' (because it checks account_id first), showing 'Non collegato' in UI even though checkouts work. Minor discrepancy - low impact.

issues: Validation rate shows >100% (207%) due to backend bug - visually misleading for venue admins

action_items: HIGH: Add `<Route path='/orders' element={<DashboardOrders />} />` in Dashboard.jsx and a sidebar menu item to navigate to it (DashboardOrders with refund buttons is orphaned)
HIGH: Add `stripe_onboarded: Optional[bool] = None` to VenueSettingsUpdate model in server.py so onboarding wizard can properly save stripe_onboarded=True

MEDIUM: Fix validation rate calculation in /api/dashboard/stats: filter scans to only count those belonging to the current venue's orders (line ~632 in server.py: `scanned_order_ids = set(s['order_id'] for s in all_scans if s['order_id'] in set(o['id'] for o in all_orders))`)
LOW: Seed data should set stripe_account_id for venues with stripe_onboarded=True, or the Payments dashboard should handle the case where stripe_onboarded=True but stripe_account_id=None
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardOrders is imported but not routed in Dashboard.jsx - the entire orders management page (refund functionality) is inaccessible to venue admins
VenueSettingsUpdate model missing stripe_onboarded field - onboarding wizard silently fails to set stripe_onboarded for new venues
Validation rate in dashboard stats is computed using scans from all venues (missing venue_id filter), making it meaningless/wrong

success_rate.frontend: 85% - all pages load and main flows work; DashboardOrders unreachable, validation rate wrong, onboarding stripe_onboarded silent fail

seed_data_creation: Ran seed_data.py - created 4 venues (Museo Civico Brescia, Duomo Milano, Gallerie Uffizi, Colosseo), ~100 orders, scans, staff members
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 100% passing. Critical VenueLanding.jsx bug was fixed (wrong API endpoints). Key remaining bugs: 1) DashboardOrders not routed (no /dashboard/orders route + no sidebar link), 2) stripe_onboarded not saved in onboarding flow (VenueSettingsUpdate missing field), 3) Validation rate >100% due to all-venues scans query. Public venue pages, checkout, success with QR, admin panel, reports CSV, poster PDF all working. Scanner works (camera not available in test env).

VenueLanding_wrong_endpoints.bug: VenueLanding.jsx called GET /api/venues/${slug} and GET /api/venues/${id}/tickets which don't exist in the backend
VenueLanding_wrong_endpoints.root_cause: Page was written referencing non-existent API endpoints instead of the correct /api/public/venue/${slug} which returns both venue and tickets
VenueLanding_wrong_endpoints.fix_applied: Changed to use GET /api/public/venue/${slug} which returns {venue, tickets} in a single response

DashboardOrders_not_routed.bug: DashboardOrders component (with orders table, refund buttons, CSV export) is imported in Dashboard.jsx but no Route element uses it
DashboardOrders_not_routed.root_cause: Route was never added when DashboardOrders was implemented
DashboardOrders_not_routed.fix_needed: In Dashboard.jsx, add <Route path='/orders' element={<DashboardOrders />} /> inside Routes, add sidebar menu item

validation_rate_cross_venue.bug: Validation rate shows >100% (207%) for demo venue
validation_rate_cross_venue.root_cause: In get_dashboard_stats, `all_scans = await db.scans.find({}, ...)` fetches ALL scans from all venues with no venue filter. This inflates scanned_order_ids count vs venue-specific all_orders
validation_rate_cross_venue.fix_needed: Filter scans to only include scans where order_id is in the set of venue's order IDs

onboarding_stripe_onboarded_not_saved.bug: New venues created through onboarding will have stripe_onboarded=False, causing checkout to fail with 'Biglietteria non ancora attiva'
onboarding_stripe_onboarded_not_saved.root_cause: Onboarding wizard sends stripe_onboarded:true to PUT /api/dashboard/settings, but VenueSettingsUpdate model doesn't include stripe_onboarded field so it's silently dropped by Pydantic
onboarding_stripe_onboarded_not_saved.fix_needed: Add `stripe_onboarded: Optional[bool] = None` to VenueSettingsUpdate model in server.py
